game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Taboo - le jeu de officiel:** Taboo is a digital party game for 2-6 players, where two teams compete to guess the most words within a time limit. During a team's turn, one player acts as the clue-giver, viewing a target word and five associated "taboo" words on their screen, while their teammates attempt to guess the target word. The clue-giver taps "Correct" for successful guesses or "Skip" to pass on a card, but must avoid using any of the taboo words; if a taboo word is spoken, the opposing team taps a "Buzzer" button, resulting in a point deduction for the clue-giver's team. Each round typically lasts 60 seconds, during which the clue-giver aims to describe as many words as possible, and the game progresses through a customizable number of rounds, such as 3-5 rounds. The team with the highest cumulative score at the end of all rounds is declared the winner.
game_info.description: Taboo Challenge is a fast-paced word guessing game where you race against time to describe target words without using forbidden "taboo" words. Score points by successfully guessing words, but be careful - using a taboo word costs you points! Complete multiple rounds to achieve the highest score possible.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select cards
Space: Confirm selection, mark word as correct, or skip card
Shift: Mark card as incorrect (taboo word used)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates core game mechanics. Tests navigation through menus, card selection, and basic scoring. Ensures the game can transition between phases correctly and that input handling works as expected.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the start menu, select a round count, and play through one round by marking several cards as correct and some as skipped. Test both correct and incorrect actions to validate scoring mechanics work properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully navigates menus, starts a round, processes cards with correct/skip/incorrect actions, and completes at least one round. The game should reach GAME_OVER state with a valid score reflecting the actions taken.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test that aims to achieve the highest possible score. Tests the game's win condition by completing multiple rounds with maximum efficiency, marking as many cards as correct as possible while avoiding incorrect penalties.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Select maximum rounds (5), then systematically mark cards as correct as quickly as possible throughout all rounds. Minimize skips and avoid incorrect actions entirely. Complete all rounds to maximize the final score and demonstrate mastery of game mechanics.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test completes all 5 rounds with a high score (40+ points), demonstrating efficient card progression. The game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state with the player having successfully guessed many words across all rounds without significant penalties.
